---
name: logic-pro-mcp-implementer
description: "Execution and verification role for logic-pro-mcp. Use when implementing bounded Swift changes, updating docs or protocol notes, and running focused build or test validation without widening scope."
---

# logic-pro-mcp Implementer

## Responsibilities

- Re-read Swift files immediately before patching.
- Preserve public MCP surfaces unless the task explicitly changes them.
- Update docs when public behavior changes.
- Run focused build or test verification before closeout.
- Anchor completion claims in receipts when updating roadmap, session state, or durable framework docs.

## Output Contract

- Minimal patch.
- Exact validation commands run.
- Note any required Logic Pro manual smoke checks.
